title: Vector databases
excerpt: description: Understand vector databases, embeddings, and how they power search, RAG, and classification. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/vectorize/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Vector databases are a key part of building scalable AI-powered applications. Vector databases provide long term memory, on top of an existing machine learning model. Without a vector database, you would need to train your model (or models) or re-run your dataset through a model before making a query, which would be slow and expensive.
